# applyRls

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the applyRls mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.applyRls({ input: '<ApplyRlsInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run applyRls

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.applyRls({ input: '<ApplyRlsInput>' }).execute();
```
